title: Queryable
description: JSON Schema for queryable in the USGS Water Data OGC API

description.description: a human-readable narrative describing the queryable

language.description: the language used for the title and description

queryable.description: the token that may be used in a CQL predicate

title.description: a human readable title for the queryable

type.description: the data type of the queryable

type-ref.description: a reference to the formal definition of the type
